km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស
km.Brampton, Herefordshire, England: លីតលបរាមពតូន, ហេរេហ្វូរដសហីរេ, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.Brampton, Herefordshire, England: 英國賀福爾蕾托 布藍普頓
zh.lifeSummary: Bernard De Brampton I於1046年出生在英國。他與Maud de Braose結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1064年在他的家鄉享年18歲。

zh-hans.Brampton, Herefordshire, England: 英国賀福爾蕾托 布藍普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Bernard De Brampton I于1046年出生在英国。他与Maud de Braose结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1064年在他的家乡享年18岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brampton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from one or more of the many places called Brampton (Northants, Hunts, Herefs, Derbys, Lincs, WR Yorks, Norfolk, Suffolk, Westm, Cumb). There is a distinct early bias towards the E Midlands, E Anglia and Yorks.

variants.name: Brunton
meanings: Scottish and northern English: habitational name from Brunton in Fife, from Old English burna ‘stream’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. This surname is also common in Ireland.
English: variant of Brompton, a habitational name from any of the places called from Brompton in East and North Yorkshire, Middlesex, and Shropshire. Or, a variant of Branton 2.

variants.name: Brompton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Brompton (ER Yorks, NR Yorks, Middx, Shrops).

variants.name: Branton
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Branton in South Yorkshire (formerly in Yorkshire) and Northumberland or from Braunton in Devon. The first and last are named with Old English brōm ‘broom’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’. The second is from an Old English word brēmen ‘overgrown with broom’ + tūn ‘farmstead’.

variant of Brampton, a habitational name from one or more of the many places called Brampton (Northamptonshire, Huntingtonshire, Herefordshire, Derbyshire, Lincolnshire, Yorkshire, Norfolk, Suffolk, Westmorland, and Cumberland), all of which are named with Old English brōm ‘broom’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

en.lifeSummary: Bernard De Brampton I was born in 1046, in England. He married Maud de Braose. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1064, in his hometown, at the age of 18.

fr.lifeSummary: Bernard De Brampton I est né en 1046, à Angleterre. Il a épousé Maud de Braose. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1064, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 18 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Bernard De Brampton I wurde 1046 in England geboren. Er hat Maud de Braose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1064 im Alter von 18 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Bernard De Brampton I è nato il nel 1046 nel England. Lui sposato Maud de Braose. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1064, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 18 anni.

ja.Brampton, Herefordshire, England: イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリットル ブランプトン
ja.lifeSummary: Bernard De Brampton Iは1046年にイギリスで生まれた。Maud de Braoseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1064年に故郷で18歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bernard De Brampton I(은)는 1046년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 Maud de Braose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1064년 그의 고향에서 18세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Bernard De Brampton I nasceu em 1046, em Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Maud de Braose. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1064, em sua cidade natal, com 18 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Bernard De Brampton I родился в 1046 г. в местности Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Braose. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1064 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 18 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Bernard De Brampton I nació en 1046, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Maud de Braose. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1064, en su pueblo, a la edad de 18 años.

th.1045–Female: ปี1045–ถึงแก่กรรม
th.Brampton, Herefordshire, England: ลิตเติลบรัมปตัน, เฮอรีฟอรดชิเร, เองกแลนด
